title: Mr-A's divinity mod
description: custom weapons, items, blocks and more, all items will be better than netherite and as i get better at modding ill add more stuff.
body: i was bored so i made a mod, this mod is a progression mod, and my first good mod, its tier progression, starting at bolt ore, there will be multiple new items, weapons, mobs, structures and more as the mod is created, it is a work in progress from a bored british guy.
